headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Want a Discount on Your Next Home? Realtor.com®'s New Report Says Look at Foreclosures
summary: Buyers looking for a discount may want to take a closer look at foreclosed homes. According to a new Realtor.com® report on the state of the foreclosure market, the median foreclosed home sold for 27.2% below its estimated value, as foreclosure listings climbed to their highest level in 6 years.
